description_long: This is a wooden A-frame easel with three slender legs, supporting a rectangular white canvas or board. The easel features a prominent, metallic or bronze-colored sculpted hand attached to the upper left of the canvas, casting a distinct shadow. The wood has a slightly weathered, matte finish, and the rear support strut is visible, providing stability. The canvas or board is held securely in place by a horizontal ledge and possibly a clamp at the top. The overall construction appears lightweight but sturdy, suitable for outdoor or urban art displays. No other objects or surfaces are visible around the easel, making it appear isolated.
description: A wooden A-frame easel with a white canvas and a metallic sculpted hand attached to the upper left. The structure is lightweight, sturdy, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white canvas and the metallic hand attached to the upper left, with all three legs visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the canvas and the protruding metallic hand, with the rear support strut visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the canvas and the full A-frame support structure, with the hand barely visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the hand's profile and the thinness of the canvas, with the support strut extending backward.
